briefdescription.para: Write a value to a register at the specified offset.
Read a value from a register at the specified offset.
Lens distortion warp type.
Arbitrary distortion warp type.
Warp type enumeration.
Callback function pointer type.
Word type definition.
Initialize the warp init driver instance by base address.

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes the XV_warp_init driver instance by looking up the configuration structure based on the base address and calling the configuration initialization function.

parameterdescription.para: Pointer to the XV_warp_init instance to initialize
Base address to look up in the configuration table, or 0 to use the first available configuration

simplesect.para: XST_SUCCESS on successful initialization XST_DEVICE_NOT_FOUND if the base address is not found
This function is only available in SDT builds. The InstancePtr must not be NULL.

briefdescription.para: Lookup configuration structure by base address.

detaileddescription.para: This function searches the configuration table for a matching base address and returns a pointer to the corresponding configuration structure.

parameterdescription.para: The base address to search for in the configuration table, or 0 to return the first entry

simplesect.para: Pointer to the matching XV_warp_init_Config structure, or NULL if no match is found
This function is only available in SDT builds

briefdescription.para: Initialize the warp init instance with configuration.

detaileddescription.para: This function initializes the XV_warp_init driver instance using the provided configuration structure. Sets up base addresses and initializes the descriptor configuration.

simplesect.para: This function is only available in non-Linux builds. Both pointers must not be NULL.

briefdescription.para: Start the warp init IP core.

detaileddescription.para: This function starts the warp init IP core by setting the AP_START bit in the control register while preserving the auto-restart configuration.

simplesect.para: The instance must be ready before calling this function

briefdescription.para: Check if the warp init IP core has finished processing.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks the AP_DONE bit in the control register to determine if the IP core has completed its current operation.

briefdescription.para: Check if the warp init IP core is idle.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks the AP_IDLE bit in the control register to determine if the IP core is currently idle.

briefdescription.para: Check if the warp init IP core is ready for next input.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks if the IP core is ready to accept new input by verifying that the AP_START bit is not set.

simplesect.para: 1 if ready for next input, 0 otherwise

briefdescription.para: Enable auto-restart mode for the warp init IP core.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables auto-restart mode by setting bit 7 of the control register, allowing the IP to automatically restart after completion.

briefdescription.para: Disable auto-restart mode for the warp init IP core.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables auto-restart mode by clearing the control register, requiring manual restart after each operation completes.

briefdescription.para: Get the flush done status.

detaileddescription.para: This function checks if the flush operation has completed by reading the flush done status bit from the control register.

simplesect.para: Flush done status (non-zero if flush is complete, 0 otherwise)

briefdescription.para: Set the flush bit to initiate IP core flush.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the flush bit in the control register to initiate a flush operation, clearing any pending data in the IP core pipeline.

briefdescription.para: Get the IP status register value.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the IP status register which contains various status flags from the warp init IP core.

briefdescription.para: Set the AXI master read/write address.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the 64-bit AXI master read/write base address for memory access operations.

simplesect.para: Address is written as two 32-bit registers

briefdescription.para: Get the AXI master read/write address.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the current 64-bit AXI master read/write base address.

simplesect.para: Address is read from two 32-bit registers

briefdescription.para: Set the descriptor address.

detaileddescription.para: This function sets the 64-bit descriptor base address for the warp initialization descriptor data structure.

simplesect.para: Address is written as two 32-bit registers

briefdescription.para: Get the descriptor address.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the current 64-bit descriptor base address.

simplesect.para: Address is read from two 32-bit registers

briefdescription.para: Enable global interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables the global interrupt output by setting the Global Interrupt Enable (GIE) register.

briefdescription.para: Disable global interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the global interrupt output by clearing the Global Interrupt Enable (GIE) register.

briefdescription.para: Enable specific interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: This function enables the interrupts specified by the mask parameter by setting the corresponding bits in the Interrupt Enable Register (IER).

parameterdescription.para: Interrupt mask with bits set for interrupts to enable

simplesect.para: Multiple interrupts can be enabled simultaneously using OR'd mask

briefdescription.para: Disable specific interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: This function disables the interrupts specified by the mask parameter by clearing the corresponding bits in the Interrupt Enable Register (IER).

parameterdescription.para: Interrupt mask with bits set for interrupts to disable

simplesect.para: Multiple interrupts can be disabled simultaneously using OR'd mask

briefdescription.para: Clear interrupt status flags.

detaileddescription.para: This function clears the interrupt status flags specified by the mask parameter by writing to the Interrupt Status Register (ISR).

parameterdescription.para: Interrupt mask with bits set for interrupts to clear

simplesect.para: Write 1 to clear the corresponding interrupt status bit

briefdescription.para: Get enabled interrupts.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the Interrupt Enable Register (IER) value showing which interrupts are currently enabled.

simplesect.para: Contents of the Interrupt Enable Register

briefdescription.para: Get interrupt status.

detaileddescription.para: This function reads and returns the Interrupt Status Register (ISR) value showing which interrupts are currently pending.

simplesect.para: Contents of the Interrupt Status Register
